hi: Hello! 👋 Welcome to the College Enquiry Chatbot. How can I help you today?
hello: Hi there! 😊 How can I assist you?
how are you: I'm just a chatbot, but I'm working perfectly to help you! 😄
who are you: I am a College Enquiry Chatbot designed to assist students with information.
help: I can help you with fees, courses, syllabus, admissions, and more.
pay fee: You can pay fees through the student portal using net banking, UPI, or card payment.
fees: The fee depends on the course. Example: CSE - 50,000/year.
access courses: You can access courses through the college LMS portal using your student login.
courses: We offer courses like CSE, ECE, MECH, CIVIL, and more.
pdf: Subject PDFs and syllabus are available in the Resources section.
syllabus: Syllabus can be downloaded from the student portal.
hostel: Hostel facilities are available for both boys and girls with good amenities.
placement: We have around 90% placement with top companies visiting the campus.
admission: You can apply online through the official college website.
apply: Visit the college website and fill out the admission form online.
thank you: You're welcome! 😊 Feel free to ask anything else.
